deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July: Free Original Glazed Doughnut — Wear Red, White & Blue Today!
deals.desc: Walk into any participating Krispy Kreme today in red, white and blue and score one free Original Glazed doughnut in celebration of America's 250th birthday.

deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July: Add a Dozen Original Glazed for Just $2.50 — Code USA
deals.desc: Through July 5, use code USA online or in app to add an Original Glazed dozen to any dozen or 16-count Minis purchase for just $2.50.

deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July: Whopper Jr. for $2.50 — Royal Perks App
deals.desc: Royal Perks members can grab a Whopper Jr. for just $2.50 via the BK App or BK.com today in honor of America's 250th birthday.

deals.deal: 🎆 America $2.50 Menu — Hot Dog, Jr. Double, Onion Rings, or RWB Slush Float
deals.desc: Through July 12, snag a 6-inch All-American Hot Dog, Jr. Double Cheeseburger, Medium Onion Rings, or Red White & Blue Slush Float for just $2.50 each at participating locations — no app or loyalty card required.

deals.deal: 🎆 Stars & Stripes Misty Slush Float — $2.50 (Last Day!)
deals.desc: Today is the final day to grab DQ's patriotic Stars & Stripes Misty Slush Float in small for $2.50 — layers of cherry and blue raspberry slush topped with soft serve and star sprinkles.

deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July: FREE Star-Spangled Biscuit — MyRewards App (Last Day!)
deals.desc: Today is the last day MyRewards members can claim a free star-shaped, berry-flavored Star-Spangled Biscuit via the Hardee's app — no purchase necessary.

deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July BOGO: Free Sandwich with Code FREEDOM (Last Day!)
deals.desc: JJ Rewards members can use code FREEDOM today through the Jimmy John's site or app for a buy-one-get-one-free Regular Toasted or Favorite Sandwich at participating locations.

deals.deal: 🎆 'Finger Lickin' Fourth' — 12-Pc Bucket for $15 Through July 11
deals.desc: KFC's limited-time Fourth of July promotion offers a 12-piece bucket of Original or Extra Crispy fried chicken for just $15 at participating locations.

deals.deal: $6 Big Box — 2-Pc Chicken or 3 Tenders + 2 Sides + Biscuit
deals.desc: Through July 13, score Popeyes' $6 Big Box with your choice of 2-piece Signature Chicken or 3 Tenders, two regular sides, and a biscuit — valid in-store, online, or in-app.

deals.deal: Free Medium Fries Every Friday with $1+ Purchase — App
deals.desc: Every Friday, McDonald's app members can score free medium fries with any $1 or more purchase — a recurring weekly perk available all year.

deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings for $9.99 — Online or App
deals.desc: Through July 26, get any Domino's pizza (excluding XL and specialty) with any crust including Parmesan Stuffed Crust and up to seven toppings for $9.99 when you select the offer online or in app.

deals.deal: 3 Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.59 — Every Thursday 3–11 PM (App)
deals.desc: Every Thursday from 3 to 11 PM, Taco Bell app members can grab three Grilled Chicken Tacos starting at just $3.59 — a recurring, app-exclusive weekly deal.

deals.deal: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box — Ongoing App Deal
deals.desc: The Taco Bell app's ongoing Luxe Cravings Box packs a Beef Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips with nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99.

deals.deal: $5 Biggie Bag — App
deals.desc: Wendy's app offers the $5 Biggie Bag with your choice of Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT, 4-piece nuggets, junior fries, and a small drink.

deals.deal: Summer of Extras — Earn a FREE Entrée After 7 Visits/Month
deals.desc: Chipotle Rewards members who activate Summer of Extras in-app can earn bonus points with every entrée purchase and unlock a free entrée or 1,625 points after completing 7 visits in July — runs through August 31.

deals.deal: BOGO $5: Buy One, Get a Second Entrée for $5 — Code BOGO5
deals.desc: For a limited time, Panera Rewards members can buy any whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, or soup and get a second for just $5 by entering code BOGO5 at checkout in the app or online.

deals.deal: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu — Up to 10 Half-Portion Items
deals.desc: Panera's Mix & Match deal prices eligible soups, salads, and sandwiches at $4.99 each when you order 2–10 items, with one free side per order — available through the app or in-cafe.

deals.deal: $1 Chips & Guac Every Monday — Loco Rewards App
deals.desc: Every Monday, El Pollo Loco Loco Rewards members get a regular chips and guacamole for just $1 with any $11.99+ purchase — a recurring weekly drive-thru healthy deal, one use per week.

deals.deal: BOGO Large Create Your Own Pizza (July 2–8 via DashPass)
deals.desc: DashPass members can score a buy-one-get-one-free large Create Your Own pizza at Pizza Hut through July 8 as part of the FIFA World Cup Watch Party Week deals on DoorDash.

deals.deal: 🎆 4th of July Eagle Cup — $10.99 Gets You a Free Medium Drink + 30-Day $3 Drink Codes
deals.desc: Dunkin's limited-edition Eagle Cup is $10.99 and includes a free medium beverage plus a code inside for $3 off any medium Dunkin' Zero or Refresher each day for 30 days — available while supplies last.
